# Spectrophotometry

**Summary**: Measurement of light absorbance to estimate biomass concentration.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2016]] used spectrophotometry to measure optical density (OD) at 680 nm to monitor growth kinetics.
